name: robot-lsp-vscode
description: VS Code client for the Robot LSP language server.

robot-lsp.languageServer.python.markdownDescription: Explicit Python executable used to start the Robot LSP language server. When empty, the extension resolves the selected workspace Python.

robot-lsp.languageServer.command.markdownDescription: Full command override used to start the language server. When set, this bypasses Python interpreter resolution.

robot-lsp.languageServer.args.markdownDescription: Additional or override arguments for the language server process.

robot-lsp.languageServer.cwd.markdownDescription: Working directory for the language server process. Supports `${workspaceFolder}`.

robot-lsp.languageServer.env.markdownDescription: Environment variables injected into the language server process.

robot-lsp.runtime.python.markdownDescription: Python executable used for future run/debug execution.

robot-lsp.runtime.env.markdownDescription: Environment variables injected into future run/debug execution.

robot-lsp.runtime.pythonPath.markdownDescription: Entries added to PYTHONPATH or Robot Framework --pythonpath during future run/debug execution.

robot-lsp.variables.markdownDescription: Robot variables injected into static analysis and future run/debug execution. Example: `{ "EXECDIR": "${workspaceFolder}" }`.

robot-lsp.completion.snippets.markdownDescription: Enable snippet completions from Robot LSP.

robot-lsp.testExplorer.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable future Robot LSP Test Explorer integration.

robot-lsp.debug.allowKeywordEvaluate.markdownDescription: Allow future debug console evaluation that can execute Robot Framework keywords.

robot-lsp.debug.breakOnFailure.markdownDescription: Break on Robot Framework failure events in future debug sessions.

robot-lsp.debug.breakOnError.markdownDescription: Break on Robot Framework error events in future debug sessions.
